sn35.216-218:0.3: The Exterior and What’s Suffering in the Three Times
sn35.216-218:1.1: "Bhikkhus, forms … mental phenomena of the past … of the future … of the present are suffering. What is suffering is nonself. What is nonself should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’ Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
